mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP Hamming/prefix-distance gradient assembles the 4-byte UCS4_2143 magic incrementally; I2S mutator in vpc diverts energy toward other encoding literals, causing it to stall on the sibling UTF16BE gate instead.
one_line: VP gradient climbs toward 4-byte UCS4_2143 magic; I2S diverts to sibling gates

mechanism_summary: value_profile wins the FALSE side of the 9-clause CDATA AND gate via CMP_MAP gradient; I2S in vpc splices the '<!CDATA[', '<?xml', '<!DOCTYPE' literal comparands back into inputs, flooding the corpus with true-side completions and diverting it away from the false-side general-parse path.
one_line: I2S floods corpus with CDATA/doctype literals, starving false-side path VP reaches
